medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Pt is a ___ year old woman with a history of polycystic kidney disease s/p failed transplant now on MWF HD, mitral regurgitation, AS, Afib (on coumadin?), who reports sudden onset L forearm pain with swelling starting three days prior to admission. Edema spread into her hand and elbow; pt showed a doctor at her HD ___, who reportedly prescribed a Z-pak for possible cellulitis. Pain did not subside, and she presented to ___ for further evaluation. Of note, she carries a diagnosis of ITP, and has been on prednisone for the past month, which has caused weight gain and possible thrush/oral herpes.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Recurrent fevers - E. coli bacteremia, s/p WBC scan revealed chronic cholecystitis, s/p CCY - Klebsiella bacteremia - h/o C. diff colitis; ESRD s/p failed ECD renal transplant - c/b urinary obstruction, multiple UTIs, nephrostomy tube - s/p coil embolization of graft artery - h/o multiple episodes of CMV viremia - h/o BK viremia; Chronic atrial fibrillation s/p modified AV ablation - dCHF, last EF > 55% - Tachycardic cardiomyopathy - MR/TR; Aortic stenosis; PCKD s/p bilateral nephrectomies; HTN; Endometrial cancer; Primary Hyperparathyroidism; Hypothyroidism; Knee Osteoarthritis.
medical_history.family_history: Father & daughter w/ PKD. No history of CAD.

physical_examination.general_examination: Vitals: T 97.7, HR 106, BP 100/68, RR 14, O2 sat 94% on RA. Alert, oriented, responding appropriately, no acute distress.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Tachycardic, irregularly irregular, holosystolic murmur heard best at LUSB; Extensive swelling throughout and tenderness/swelling over the olecranon bursa. Induration and erythema over soft tissue of just distal to elbow. Edema extends down to dorsum of L hand.
